title: Remove the 7th image from the Gallery section

requirements.text: Update `frontend/src/sections/GallerySection.tsx` to remove the 7th image from the Gallery so it is not displayed as a tile and cannot be opened in the lightbox. The 7th image is currently the entry with `uploadSrc` `assets/uploads/IMG_0541-1.jpeg` (fallback `assets/generated/sgi-gallery-07-v2.dim_1200x1200.jpg`, alt `Textile Manufacturing Equipment`).
acceptanceCriteria: The Gallery grid renders 7 tiles instead of 8.
No tile in the Gallery uses `assets/uploads/IMG_0541-1.jpeg` or fallback `assets/generated/sgi-gallery-07-v2.dim_1200x1200.jpg`.
The removed image cannot be opened in the lightbox (because it is not present in the `images` list).
All remaining Gallery tiles still open correctly in the existing lightbox dialog.
The existing safeguard that excludes `IMG_0552.png` remains in place.

constraints: Frontend immutable paths must not be edited: `frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts`, `frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx`, `frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts`, `frontend/src/main.tsx`, `frontend/src/components/ui`.
Keep backend as a single Motoko actor; no backend changes are required for this request.
nonGoals: Do not change the Gallery section title, subtitle, layout, styling, or lightbox UI beyond what is necessary to remove the 7th image.
Do not add or replace any other gallery images.
